repositories.name: dao-code
repositories.description: Open-source TypeScript terminal coding agent for DeepSeek-V4 — builds on DeepSeek's strong price-performance and ultra-cheap cache pricing, engineering byte-stable prefixes and cache-reusing forks so cross-session memory and a continuous self-correction layer add almost no token cost; 1M context, Skills/MCP/Hooks, Claude Code config compatible.
repositories.descriptionZh: DeepSeek-V4的开源TypeScript终端编码代理——基于DeepSeek强大的性价比和超廉价的缓存定价，设计字节稳定的前缀和缓存重用分叉，因此跨会话内存和连续的自校正层几乎不增加令牌成本；1M上下文，技能/MCP/Hokes，兼容克劳德代码配置。
